title: Chocolate Krinkles
ingredients: 2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and slightly cooled
instructions: Cream butter, sugar, and vanilla. Beat in eggs, one at a time. Add melted chocolate. Blend in half sifted dry ingredients with half of milk and repeat. Stir in walnuts if used. Refrigerate for 3-4 hours. Roll into 1 inch balls and roll in powdered sugar. Place on parchment lined baking sheets and bake at 350 degrees for 12-13 minutes.
